apify.name: My Implant Dentist
apify.description:
My Implant Dentist (MID) is one of Australia’s fastest-growing dental implant and full-arch rehabilitation providers. We are known for our honest advice, transparent pricing and commitment to affordable clinical excellence.

From one Perth clinic in 2019, we’ve grown to 10+ locations across WA, QLD and VIC, supported by our own in-house digital dental lab and a national team dedicated to exceptional patient care. 

Our Mission
To make world-class implant dentistry accessible through a model built on transparency, affordability, advanced digital workflows and a consistently high-quality patient experience. Every patient deserves honest and clear options, predictable outcomes and genuine care.

What Sets Us Apart
• Honest, pressure-free treatment planning and upfront pricing
• State and National recognition and award-winning patient experience year after year. 

Our Team & Reach
We now have 200+ team members. Our clinics span metro, regional and remote communities across Western Australia, Brisbane and Melbourne.

Join Us
MID is expanding nationally and we’re always seeking talented clinicians and professionals who want to grow in a high-performance, supportive environment. Opportunities exist for implant and restorative dentists, surgical clinicians, general and cosmetic dentists, OHTs, nurses, treatment coordinators, dental technicians and operational specialists including practice managers, treatment coordinators, sales consultants, marketing. 

If you’re passionate about delivering exceptional patient care and want to be part of a team shaping the future of implant dentistry in Australia, connect with us to explore career opportunities.

apify.name: Imperial Health Charity
apify.description: Imperial Health Charity supports the five hospitals of the Imperial College Healthcare NHS Trust: Charing Cross, Hammersmith, Queen Charlotte's & Chelsea, St Mary's and the Western Eye. Every year we award millions of pounds in grants to fund major redevelopments, clinical research and medical equipment, as well as helping patients and families at times of real hardship.  We run the volunteer service across the hospitals, manage a museum-accredited collection of more than 2,000 artworks and fundraise through appeals so that we can continue our vital work.

apify.name: Bergen Volunteer Medical Initiative (BVMI)
apify.description: The BVMI Healthcare Center works to improve the overall health of working, low-income, uninsured residents of Bergen County by providing free primary and preventive health care, promoting patient education, and reducing the need for emergency care.  BVMI utilizes the services of volunteer physicians, nurse practitioners, nurses and others wherever possible. By creating A Culture of Caring, staff and volunteers at BVMI respect the dignity and individuality of patients. On an annual basis, over 75 volunteer medical providers at this nonprofit organization treat 1,200 patients in 8,000 patient visits.

apify.name: Australian Migration Law Pty Ltd
apify.description:
Immigration Lawyers in Sydney, Australia – Trusted Since 2008. 

Australian Migration Law Pty Ltd is a Sydney-based immigration law firm led by Principal Solicitor Linda Morrison, who has been practising law since 1992. Admitted to the Supreme Court and High Court of Australia, Linda brings over three decades of legal experience across Australia and internationally, particularly in the retail, trade, and international employment sectors.

Before founding the firm, Linda developed a strong foundation in criminal and commercial law, and went on to operate her own businesses focused on international trade and the placement of specialised staff in more than 30 countries. This background has shaped her in-depth knowledge of working visa requirements, especially for trade-based applicants and local employers.

Linda also has significant experience assisting with inter-country adoptions through her community volunteer work, and provides compassionate, effective support for family visa applications. Her dedication and efficiency have earned recognition from the Department of Immigration and Border Protection in Washington, D.C., for expediting a complex visa application on behalf of a client.

At Australian Migration Law, we are committed to helping individuals, families, and businesses navigate Australia’s immigration system with experience, care, and results.

Our dedication to innovation has positioned us as a driving market force in several key technology areas, including highly power-efficient mobile technologies, automotive solutions and a broad range of advanced multimedia products such as smartphones, tablets, digital televisions, 5G, Voice Assistant Devices (VAD) and wearables. MediaTek empowers and inspires people to expand their horizons and achieve their goals through smart technology, more easily and efficiently than ever before. We work with the brands you love to make great technology accessible to everyone, and it drives everything we do. Visit www.mediatek.com for more information.

Any interested candidates for worldwide positions at MediaTek are asked to apply only through mediatek.com, or via the applicable posting directly on LinkedIn.

apify.name: Family Doctor
apify.description:
Welcome to the Family Doctor group of medical and dental practices across Australia.

We are a network of 100% GP owned and operated medical and dental practices committed to comprehensive patient care. Our practices provide high quality medical care for our patients, and we pride ourselves in our services to the community.

The group was founded in 2008 and is seeking to grow further and is looking for like minded practice owners who are interested in succession planning, or to relieve themselves of the day to day administrative burdens of owning and operate a general practice. We offer a great package tailored to your needs with the added incentive of your practice then being owned and managed by an experienced GP. Message me now for a confidential discussion. 

Family Doctor is always looking for experienced General Practitioners (VR and non VR) to join our centres, and offer the following advantages:
- Family Doctor is 100% owned by a General Practitioner - no Investors and no Board. So the focus is always on delivering better patient outcomes (not shareholder outcomes!).
- Access to fantastic clinic resources such as MyCubiko and Up-To-Date at every practice.
- Complete billing and clinical autonomy.
- Fully flexible arrangement - work whenever and however you wish - no lock in agreements, no restraints.
- Special interests supported including skin cancer, IUD insertion, travel medicine, allergy skin testing and more.
- Expect billings of >$400 per hour due to exceptional support and systems.
- Friendly, supportive and modern environments and facilities.
See available opportunities here: https://familydoctor.com.au/gp_opportunities/

apify.name: Global Student Startup Competition
apify.description:
The Global Student Startup Competition (GSSC) is an in-person, international undergraduate entrepreneurship program held annually in Seoul alongside the Asian Leadership Conference (ALC).

GSSC convenes top undergraduate founders from leading universities and emerging innovation regions to collaborate in person, build human-centered ventures, and engage directly with global leaders from industry, government, academia, and civil society. The program emphasizes cross-cultural collaboration, ethical leadership, and real-world problem solving through a fully in-person global experience.

Each year, approximately 100 undergraduate students (up to 20 teams) are selected through university invitations and competitive regional qualifiers to participate in GSSC Worlds, the global convening in Seoul. All teams compete on the same stage under identical standards, ensuring parity of access regardless of how participation is funded.

GSSC was born out of the Asian Leadership Conference, Korea’s premier international leadership forum, through a founding collaboration connecting ALC with undergraduate entrepreneurship leaders in the United States and Asia. The competition is operated by the Global Student Startup Foundation (GSSF), a U.S.-based nonprofit public benefit organization dedicated to expanding equitable access to in-person global opportunities for undergraduate students.

Beyond the competition, GSSC is supported by a growing multigenerational community of students, mentors, organizers, and partners—often referred to as GSSC Friends & Family—who remain engaged across years to support the next generation of student founders.

By connecting regional student ecosystems through an annual global convening, GSSC serves as a leadership pipeline that helps students build lasting relationships, broaden perspective, and carry global insight back to their local communities.

apify.name: Metcash
apify.description:
At Metcash, we’re the power behind an independent Australia & New Zealand. From the humble origins of our first family-owned corner store in 1927, we’ve been backing independents and strengthening the communities they operate in for almost 100 years. With a national network of more than 10,000 independent retailers and a further 90,000 wholesalers, we’re the driving force behind local, family-owned businesses – sticking up for the little guys and helping them become the best stores in town.  And while we may be large in size, we’ll always be locals at heart.

Today we’re Australia and New Zealand’s leading independent retail partner and wholesaler in food, liquor and hardware. We have over 80 years of experience supporting and championing the interests of independent grocery, liquor and hardware sectors. Headquartered in Sydney, our world class distribution facilities across the country allow us to operate on a huge scale to unite Australia's independent grocers, delivering products to more than 10,000 retail premises and a further 90,000 wholesale customers across the food, grocery, liquor and hardware markets. Our network of Successful Independents includes a large portfolio of brands such as IGA, Foodland, Mitre 10, Home Timber & Hardware, Cellarbrations and the Bottle-O. 

At Metcash we have a single purpose - Successful Independents - it is at the heart of everything we do. Success starts with our people. Employing over 6,000 people, Metcash champions the interests of the independent retail industry. We are a team of people who are resilient and empowered, who take initiative and pride in their work and above all operate with integrity. Our core operations are key to providing our customers and retailers with merchandising, operations and marketing support through our strong retail brands.  

Whilst we operate on a huge scale, we think big but we act local. We believe that independence is worth fighting for and this is at the core of our business divisions.

apify.name: Colgate-Palmolive
apify.description:
Make More Smiles. We are Colgate-Palmolive, a caring, innovative growth company that is reimagining a healthier future for all people, their pets and our planet. For over 200 years, we've poured our care into creating a future where everyone has more reasons to smile. CP People develop, produce, distribute and sell essential health & hygiene products and pet nutrition offerings through brands such as Colgate, Palmolive, elmex, Tom’s of Maine, hello, Sorriso, Speed Stick, Softsoap, Irish Spring, Protex, Sanex, Filorga, eltaMD, PCA Skin, Ajax, Axion, Fabuloso, Soupline and Suavitel, as well as Hill’s Science Diet and Hill’s Prescription Diet.

The Company is recognized for its leadership and innovation in
promoting sustainability and community wellbeing, including its achievements in decreasing
plastic waste and promoting recyclability, saving water, conserving natural resources and
improving children’s oral health through the Colgate Bright Smiles, Bright Futures program,
which has reached approximately 1.8 billion children and their families since 1991.

apify.name: MEGT (Australia) Ltd
apify.description:
MEGT (Australia) Ltd is a not-for profit business established in 1982 which is a steadfast advocate of employment and training for all, playing an integral role in building the Australian workforce for in demand jobs and skills of the future.

MEGT has supported more than 700,000 Australians to complete their qualifications, and partnered with over 250,000 businesses to create sustainable employment solutions.

With more than 40 years experience in the Vocational Education & Training (VET) sector, MEGT successfully delivers federal and state government services, including the Australian Apprenticeship Support Services and Workforce Australia contracts. We are:

• The largest single Australian Apprenticeship Support Services provider servicing more than 100,000 active apprentices and trainees per year
• A registered Group Training Organisation (GTO) which employs apprentices and trainees who are placed within our host employer network
• Supporting 4,000 participants across both our generalist and youth specific (Transition to Work) Workforce Australia programs into employment and further training in the Western Melbourne and Gold Coast employment regions
• Delivering state-based employment programs, including empowering First Nations people, with training and employment opportunities
• National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) providers via the School Leavers Employment Services (SLES) and employment support for school leavers with disabilities
• Able to offer flexible workforce solutions via the labour hire arm of our business

apify.description:
Welcome To Glenferrie Dental

>Dental Implants
>All on 4
>Cosmetic Dentist

At Glenferrie Dental, we are committed to providing more than just dental care—we aim to create a comfortable, personalised experience for every patient. Your health and well-being are at the heart of everything we do. Whether you're here for routine care, cosmetic enhancements, or more advanced procedures, our focus is always on exceeding your expectations with service tailored to your needs.


With access to state-of-the-art equipment and the latest innovations in dental technology, we ensure that you receive the highest standard of care. From general dentistry to complex treatments, we offer a comprehensive range of services designed to meet the needs of every patient.

Our Team: Trusted Expertise and Compassion Combined

Our team is more than just experienced—we are trusted and passionate about what we do. With over 75 years of combined clinical expertise, each member brings exceptional skill and dedication to the practice. As active members of the Australian Dental Association, we stay at the forefront of industry advancements, ensuring that our patients always receive the most up-to-date care available.

We take pride in fostering a warm, supportive environment where your smile is our top priority. Every visit is an opportunity to build lasting relationships and provide care with professionalism, compassion, and integrity. Whether you need preventive care, restorative work, or cosmetic treatments, we are committed to helping you achieve optimal oral health and a smile that truly reflects your confidence.

We welcome you to experience dental care that puts your comfort, health, and happiness first. 

At Glenferrie Dental, your smile is in the best hands.

We currently have clinics all across Sydney and plan to expand nation-wide, s that all Australians can have access to affordable dental care.

apify.name: Fixed Group
apify.description:
Fixed Group comprises Fixed and Fixed Medical, providing refurbishment, fit-out, strip out and maintenance services across a range of property and building types.  From resort renovations to your local cafe fit-out or shopping centre pop-up, we are the experts in designing solutions to meet any budget and any timeframe. We welcome clients of any size for any type of problem. From fitting door handles and patching a wall to delivering highly-specialised medical installation services and complete hotel refurbishments.  

From the outset, the Fixed Group has focused on developing a service delivery method that minimises customer disruption, and therefore reduces operational risk and potential loss of earnings for the client.  With our proven methodology, we have established ourselves as the industry specialist for the delivery of installation, construction and maintenance projects to live building and commercial environments. Our unique process enables us to carry out installation and maintenance works to hospitals, labs, medical facilities, aged care facilities, hotels, resorts, and childcare facilities, all whilst our client continues full operation of its regular commercial activities.

Our success has been built on our philosophy of listening to our clients and delivering on their needs, every time. Our continued focus on providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship has resulted in the development of strong long-term relationships with many satisfied clients.  Put simply, your problems are solved with Fixed.

apify.name: Commercial Hot Water and Maintenance
apify.description:
Commercial Hot Water and Maintenance, incorporating Thermal Energy Solutions and Energy Smart Water, specialises in the design, supply and installation of commercial hot water systems built for innovation, efficiency and long‑term sustainability. Our capabilities include delivering fully integrated hot water packages featuring advanced technologies such as our ENERMAX Heat Pump Range.
Beyond installation, we provide comprehensive programmed preventative and reactive maintenance services for commercial hot water plants. Our team works closely with clients to develop tailored environmental and energy‑efficient solutions that meet the unique needs of each building and its owners.

Recognised as a trusted leader in the industry, we take pride in delivering high‑quality service through a dedicated team of skilled tradespeople who are committed to exceptional workmanship and complete customer satisfaction.

apify.name: Shine Lawyers
apify.description:
At Shine, we don't judge you or where you came from.

What we do care about is where you’re going and how we can help get you there. We are here to empower you to support our clients as they stand up in the face of injustice.

We’ve built a place for you to...

Connect and be you
Join a team of authentic people who care as much as you do about standing up for the little guy, doggedly seeking justice, and advancing the law. You’ll work with supportive experienced leaders who are invested in you. And you’ll be visible and valued for who you are and what you bring.

Challenge and be challenged
At Shine, you’ll dare to be different, questioning and challenging the status quo. That’s how we stay ahead of the pack – for our clients, for better justice and for your remarkable career.

Achieve and grow
Here, you’ll find a powerful platform for success, from our proven operating models to our award-winning Centre of Learning. You’ll discover the One Shine Way framework – your path to a career that means so much more. And you’ll be backed to seize opportunities, and trusted to deliver.

apify.name: Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration
apify.description:
Environmental Water Solutions Pty Ltd. is the registered owner and founder of Complete Home Filtration since 2018

Complete Home Filtration specialises in the installation of whole of home water filtration systems ensuring clean, delicious water from every tap that is not only better for your health and pocket but better for your home and the environment too. Never pay for bottled water again and enjoy water that is kinder to your skin and hair and everything in the home that uses water, including your water using fixtures and appliances. 

Here at Complete Home Filtration, we love nice water.  Our friends call us water snobs! We can sniff out a glass of unfiltered tap water at 50 yards and so can our kids! We live and breathe good water and believe passionately that everyone should be drinking, showering and bathing in clean, freshly filtered, softened and chlorine free water, especially if you are a bottle fed baby, child or have specific health concerns like sensitive skin or asthma.

Our unique process enables us to carry out installation and maintenance works to hospitals, labs, medical facilities, aged care facilities, hotels, resorts, and childcare facilities, all whilst our client continues full operation of its regular commercial activities.

Our success has been built on our philosophy of listening to our clients and delivering on their needs, every time. Our continued focus on providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship has resulted in the development of strong long-term relationships with many satisfied clients.  Put simply, your problems are solved with Fixed.

apify.name: Ballentine Partners, LLC
apify.description:
As an independent multi-family office, Ballentine Partners’ mission is to help 
families achieve their aspirations, build their legacy, and live the life they want to live. We measure success not just as a financial outcome, but also as a human outcome.

Serving a broad range of clients, from individual professionals and entrepreneurs with $4 million in liquid assets to multigenerational families with over $1 billion, we build customized investment solutions integrated with deep planning expertise.

We have delivered client-centric planning and sophisticated investment advice for the past four decades. We are dedicated to serving client families worldwide and providing objective advice focused on our client's best interests.

apify.name: Community Health Commission of Missouri
apify.description: The Community Health Commission of Missouri is a collaborative effort to achieve zero health disparities across Missouri through equity-centered trauma-informed care. Previously the St. Louis Regional Health Commission.

apify.name: All Four x 4 Spares
apify.description:
All Four x 4 Spares are proud to provide an environment where employees can grow their skills and be equipped with the training and tools to produce their best.

Specialists in Land Rover, Toyota and Nissan 4WD parts. We aim to provide customers with new genuine and quality aftermarket 4WD parts at a competitive price. Whether we are purchasing parts domestically or overseas, procuring quality components is paramount to ensuring the customer’s confidence in the products we supply. 

We also are a Dismantler (All Four x 4 Dismantling) processing over 100 vehicles at any one time in state of art modern facilities.

Our Workshop ( All Four x 4 Service Centre) employs a skilled team of 4wd specialist technicians with access to training and tooling to allow the ability to carry out their servicing and repairs efficiently. Although they work on all 4wds, they specialise on Land Rover, Range Rover, Toyota Landcruiser & Hilux, Nissan Patrol and Navara.

All Four x 4 Offroad is our Accessories outlet offering Bull Bars, Winches, Suspension and camping gear plus much more including Roo Systems ECU Remaps.
